description_long: This is a stylized, vintage triplane with three stacked wings, painted in a combination of red, teal, and beige hues. The fuselage is compact and features a rounded nose with a prominent, dark propeller at the front. The cockpit is open and situated just behind the upper wing, with visible window cutouts and a teal accent running along the side. The tail section is adorned with a decorative flower emblem and consists of a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The landing gear is fixed, with two main wheels and a small tail skid. The overall design is reminiscent of early 20th-century biplanes, with exaggerated, cartoon-like proportions and a playful color scheme.
description: A stylized, vintage triplane with three stacked wings, open cockpit, and a colorful red and teal paint scheme. Features a prominent front propeller, decorative tail, and fixed landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three stacked wings, central propeller, and fixed landing gear.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the open cockpit, window cutouts, and decorative tail with flower emblem.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section, horizontal stabilizers, and the triplane's layered wing structure.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing cockpit placement, landing gear, and tail details.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Triplane configuration with three straight, mid-mounted wings stacked vertically; no winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers; decorative emblem on the rudder.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a rear skid.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open cockpit located just behind the upper wing, single-seat with window cutouts.
